message.content:
[cron:176cd48b-0afd-4111-be37-850040c7316f retention-cleanup-daily (fixed delivery)] Run canonical session maintenance per CHG-0831. Execute: bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/run-openclaw-sessions-cleanup.sh --enforce. Uses OpenClaw session.maintenance config + openclaw sessions cleanup --all-agents --enforce. Log results and report summary to Yoda/main session.
Current time: Saturday, July 18th, 2026 - 5:00 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-18 09:00 UTC
